audit_policy.cost_note: Audit policy not yet verified. Contact the college for details.

senior_discount.notes: Pennsylvania law (24 P.S. § 19-1908-B) allows residents aged 60+ to audit courses tuition-free at community colleges on a space-available basis.

steps: Contact the Registrar's Office for audit enrollment procedures.
Complete an admissions application if not already enrolled.
Register for the course during the normal enrollment period.
Senior audit students (60+) must provide proof of age and PA residency.
application_process.timing: Contact the Registrar's Office for specific deadlines.

restrictions: Audit policy not yet verified — contact the college
Audit students do not receive grades or academic credit
Space availability may limit audit enrollment
Senior tuition waiver applies to tuition only; fees may still apply

audit_policy.cost_note: Pennsylvania College of Technology is a Penn State affiliate and technically a 4-year institution that also offers associate degrees. Audit policy not verified. Contact the college for details.

senior_discount.notes: Pennsylvania law (24 P.S. § 19-1908-B) allows residents aged 60+ to audit courses tuition-free at community colleges on a space-available basis. Applicability to Penn College (a 4-year affiliate) should be verified.

steps: Contact the Registrar's Office for audit enrollment procedures.
Complete an admissions application if not already enrolled.
Register for the course during the normal enrollment period.
Senior audit students (60+) should confirm eligibility with the registrar.
application_process.timing: Contact the Registrar's Office for specific deadlines.

restrictions: NOTE: Pennsylvania College of Technology is a 4-year Penn State affiliate, not a traditional community college
Audit policy not yet verified — contact the college
Audit students do not receive grades or academic credit
Space availability may limit audit enrollment
Senior tuition waiver applicability should be confirmed
